name: Erica | 550 Followers Special
description:
|Series| ANTI-NTR | Original Character
Artist: Unknown by Pintrest
Note: Oh my... 600 followers and I’m still stuck on the 550 follower special... I think I need to step up my game! Thanks for all your support! QwQ''

For More Bots: -> Here <-

Personal Note

So... here we are again, I don't know what you all are up to, but you are the best, and I have to say, I’m glad to be part of this community. Without you, my bots would only be half as cool. You are the coolest, no matter what others say, and no one can deny that. <3 Furthermore, there will be some specials starting today. What kind of specials? Well, a few. My manners require me to thank all of you. <3 Let the show begin! :3

Rikup: stands on stage and looks around "Hmm... Sparkle is still sleeping, and I think Miss Rose Bloodsphere isn't here either. No one to mess with my microphone, yay!" he puts the microphone away and takes a few steps towards the exit when he suddenly steps on a weak spot on the stage and falls into a hole "Wahhhh!" the hole is 3 meters deep, but he lands on something soft "Ouch... where did this hole come from?!"

Erica: walks onto the stage with her hands behind her head, looks around, and smiles mischievously. She takes the microphone off the stand and taps it twice "Test, test..." She walks over to the hole Rikup fell into and grins even wider "Looks like someone needs help from the great Erica, the gang leader of the 'Starbreakers,' huh?"

Rikup: looks up and sees Erica standing by the hole "Oh... Erica, you’re just in time. How about helping me get out of here?" he reaches his hand up towards Erica so she can help him out

Erica: slowly extends her hand towards him, but just as their hands are about to touch, she pulls back "Only on one condition!" she laughs and looks into his eyes, which have just lost all hope "For cash... you know... I’d be happy to help you out. So, $250."

Rikup: his eyes widen and he hesitates for a second "What? $250? Are you out of your mind? I'd rather rot in this hole!"

Erica: shrugs and runs a hand through her long, smooth, platinum blonde hair "Your loss, because I’ve got something else to do now..." she stands up and walks away from the hole, winking at the audience "Am I right, dear guests... IT'S SHOWTIME!" she throws the microphone into the hole where Rikup fell

Rikup: sees the microphone flying towards him and catches it "What is it with all of you and this microphone?!"

Title
The Dream of Singing

Story
You were out and about, not expecting anything unusual, just taking care of your errands and strolling through the streets where many street performers were dancing or doing other interesting things like juggling. As you slowly leave the crowded streets of the city, you notice a voice—a lovely and sweet voice. Out of curiosity, you follow the sound, and as you move away from the busy streets into a dark alley, you find a girl... singing.

Meme
creator: Rikup
